{"id":"smallhold-yfhy.3","title":"FEP-f228: Conversation Backfill","description":"Implement conversation backfill per FEP-f228.

**Spec:** https://codeberg.org/fediverse/fep/src/branch/main/fep/f228/fep-f228.md

**Requirements:**
- Track "context owner" (original author) for each conversation
- Maintain OrderedCollection of all replies at context endpoint
- Expose collection at context URL for remote fetch
- On receiving reply to unknown parent, backfill from context owner
- Support both AP context property and FEP-171b thread property

**Why:** Enables fetching complete threads in one request instead of chasing reply chains.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-19T02:27:45.072894812Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-19T02:27:45.072894812Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"smallhold-yfhy.3","depends_on_id":"smallhold-yfhy","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-19T02:27:45.0867911Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: FEP-f228 implemented: context_url tracking, context collection endpoint, outbound context property
